channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Rolling Stones Tease ‘Foreign Tongues’ Project
item.description: 🎸👅 Exciting news from The Rolling Stones! Get ready to rock in a whole new language with their upcoming project 'Foreign Tongues'! 🌎✨ #RollingStones #MusicNews

item.title: Good Luck Not Crying to Noah Kahan and Hayley Williams’ Performance of ‘Downfall’
item.description: Grab the tissues! Noah Kahan and Hayley Williams hit us right in the feels with their performance of 'Downfall' 😭🎶 #EmotionalDuet

item.title: ‘Wicked: For Good’ Gets Some Love at 2026 ASCAP Screen Celebrates Event
item.description: 🎶 Feelin' the love for 'Wicked: For Good' at ASCAP Screen Celebrates! 💚✨ #MusicalMagic #ASCAP2026

item.title: DJ Shadow Plots Endtroducing… 30th Anniversary Tour
item.description: 🎉 Let's celebrate 30 years of mind-blowing beats with DJ Shadow on the Endtroducing... tour! 🎶 #LegendaryVibes

item.title: Kalia Vandever Announces New Album Mana: Hear “Hubbard Road”
item.description: 🎷🎶 Get ready to groove! @kaliavandever's new album 'Mana' is dropping soon - check out "Hubbard Road" now! 🔥 #NewMusicAlert
